segments.text: Connected deep, so no confirmed combo
segments.original_text: 深いところで当てたんで確定は無いっすね

segments.text: Anti-air doesn't have a good route
segments.original_text: 対空なんでいいルートは無いか

full_text: Connected deep, so no confirmed combo. Anti-air doesn't have a good route. Back air! 90 percent and they're out! Forward air!

corrections.rule: Move abbreviation correction (90後ろ → 空後, Whisper confused kuu with ku/9)
Move abbreviation correction (90前 → 空前, Whisper confused kuu with ku/9)
